pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines APP_DIR as '/home/ga/edge-app' and creates the application files there.
export_result.sh verifies the repository by querying 'http://localhost:5000/v2/_catalog' for 'edge-app'.
export_result.sh requests the manifest for the 'latest' tag at 'http://localhost:5000/v2/edge-app/manifests/latest'.
export_result.sh verifies the presence of 'amd64' and 'arm64' architectures in the image manifest.
export_result.sh sends this media type in the Accept header to successfully fetch the manifest list.
export_result.sh sends this OCI media type as an alternative in the Accept header to fetch the manifest list.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires building and pushing a multi-architecture Docker image. The application code is located at '/home/ga/edge-app'. The image must be pushed to a local registry on port 5000 with the repository name 'edge-app' and tag 'latest'. The build must target both 'linux/amd64' and 'linux/arm64' platforms. The resulting manifest is expected to be a manifest list or OCI index ('application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json' or 'application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json').
